questions.question: Describe the primary function of WordNet, a lexical resource developed at Princeton University. (5 marks)
questions.hint: WordNet is a lexical database that represents words in a network of synonyms, related words, and their semantic fields.

questions.question: What is the main difference between a FrameNet and WordNet? (5 marks)
questions.hint: FrameNet is a lexical database that represents words in terms of their semantic frames, while WordNet represents words in terms of their lexical relations.

questions.question: Explain the concept of stemming, as demonstrated by Porter Stemmer. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Porter Stemmer is a stemming algorithm that reduces words to their base form by removing suffixes such as -ing, -ed, and -s.
